title: clinopodium nepeta var. glandulosum
intro: Clinopodium nepeta var. glandulosum, also known as glandular catmint, is a subspecies of the Clinopodium nepeta plant, a flowering plant in the mint family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Clinopodium nepeta var. glandulosum include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce fever and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
